headline: All Hail King Jesus: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: All Hail King Jesus is projected #8 of 16 with a 625.30 projected-starting-lineup C-AVI total, led by Jaxon Smith-Njigba, Amon-Ra St. Brown, and Tee Higgins. The immediate priority is improving the RB slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Sum of the eight verified projected starters' C-AVI values from all 16 AVI-Core team files

dynasty_power.method: Sum of every verified rostered player's D-AVI value from all 16 AVI-Core team files

latest_trade.summary: On July 13, All Hail King Jesus traded with Ravens Regime and acquired Isiah Pacheco, 2026 Round 1 (Southside Savages) while sending Derrick Henry. Isiah Pacheco is now on the current roster at 47.6 C-AVI and 63.4 D-AVI; The deal added 1 draft asset.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the RB slot above Zach Charbonnet's 51.8 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 53.0 C-AVI would directly attack the 1.20-point projected gap to Southside Savages.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On June 24, Badland Banditos traded with Crimson Tide Pods and acquired Kenneth Walker, 2027 Round 3 (Crimson Tide Pods) while sending Chris Rodriguez, 2026 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.), 2026 Round 1 (All Hail King Jesus). Kenneth Walker is now the current RB starter at 87.6 C-AVI and 87.0 D-AVI; The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 1 draft asset.

rival_below.summary: On June 24, Badland Banditos traded with Crimson Tide Pods and acquired Kenneth Walker, 2027 Round 3 (Crimson Tide Pods) while sending Chris Rodriguez, 2026 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.), 2026 Round 1 (All Hail King Jesus). Kenneth Walker is now the current RB starter at 87.6 C-AVI and 87.0 D-AVI; The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 1 draft asset.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #8 of 16 at 625.30 lineup C-AVI. Southside Savages is immediately above at 626.50, a gap of 1.20. Badland Banditos is immediately behind at 618.20.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Jaxon Smith-Njigba (99.1), Amon-Ra St. Brown (98.6), and Tee Higgins (81.9).

sections.title: Latest Trade Impact
sections.body: On July 13, All Hail King Jesus traded with Ravens Regime and acquired Isiah Pacheco, 2026 Round 1 (Southside Savages) while sending Derrick Henry. Isiah Pacheco is now on the current roster at 47.6 C-AVI and 63.4 D-AVI; The deal added 1 draft asset.

sections.title: Moves to Close the Gap
sections.body: Raise the RB slot above Zach Charbonnet's 51.8 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 53.0 C-AVI would directly attack the 1.20-point projected gap to Southside Savages. Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Zach Charbonnet is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 51.8. Any acquisition should clear that exact lineup threshold.

sections.body: All 10 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
